mapper.select: INSERT INTO "conversation_tool_call_execution" ( "creator_id", "modifier_id", "turn_id", "response_tool_call_id", "execution_order", "tool_key", "status", "result_content", "result_content_parts", "raw_result", "error_message", "start_time", "end_time" ) VALUES ( #{creatorId}, #{modifierId}, #{turnId}, #{responseToolCallId}, #{executionOrder}, #{toolKey}, #{status}, #{resultContent}, CAST(#{resultContentParts} AS JSONB), #{rawResult}, #{errorMessage}, #{startTime}, #{endTime} ) RETURNING "id", "creator_id", "creation_time", "modifier_id", "modification_time", "turn_id", "response_tool_call_id", "execution_order", "tool_key", "status", "result_content", "result_content_parts", "raw_result", "error_message", "start_time", "end_time"
